creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: The upstream EoL means there won't be any security fixes so I marked the ports DEPRECATED to make users aware of that.  There are no plans to remove the c7 ports because the rl9 ports don't support 32 bit programs and they require x86-64-v2 (CPU from 2010).  I've been thinking of replacing c7 with debian 12, but I don't have time for that right now.
